creator: dannyboy@FreeBSD.org
text:
OK, CPAN has it (thanks tobez@), but I can't build it:

===>  Configuring for p5-XML-Sablotron-0.61
checking for main() in -lexpat... no
You do not appear to have libexpat in the library search path.
Either install expat from http://expat.sourceforge.net/ or
re-run as:
  $ /usr/bin/perl5.00503 Makefile.PL LIBS='-L/path/to/expat/lib -lexpat -lsablot

This is on a recent 4.3-STABLE with expat-1.95.1_1 installed.

-- 
Daniel Harris
